healthy_description: Feathery dark green foliage. Orange, yellow, or red double flowers. Aromatic musky scent. Compact bushy growth.

symptom_guide.symptom: White powdery coating on leaves and flowers
symptom_guide.visual_description: Fine white fungal powder covers foliage, new growth heavily affected

symptom_guide.symptom: Gray fuzzy mold on flowers and stems
symptom_guide.visual_description: Soft brown rot with gray mold, usually in humid wet conditions

symptom_guide.symptom: Tiny pale stippling and webbing on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Leaves appear washed out and dusty with fine webbing visible on stems

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown spots with yellow halos on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Circular lesions scattered on foliage, may have concentric rings
